understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win each level (and continue until all levels are won).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal-only moves (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) are followed by automatic gravity-fall until landing on a solid tile or hazard; `CLICK` removes breakable (`x`) tiles at a target coordinate; spikes (`u`/`v`) cause instant failure; `UNDO` reverts the last action. Each attempt has a 50-turn budget; failing resets the level with 2 attempts total per level.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win each level (and continue until all levels are won).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal-only moves (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) are followed by automatic gravity-fall until landing on a solid tile or hazard; `CLICK` removes breakable (`x`) tiles at a target coordinate; spikes (`u`/`v`) cause instant failure; `UNDO` reverts the last action. Each attempt has a 50-turn budget; failing resets the level with 2 attempts total per level.
